checks.name: llms.txt
checks.recommendation: Create a /llms.txt file that describes your site structure, key pages, and content for AI agents. See llmstxt.org for the specification.

checks.name: robots.txt (AI Crawlers)
checks.details: robots.txt exists but blocks dynamic URLs (/*?) and lesson pages (*/leccion/), limiting AI crawler access to course content.
checks.recommendation: Review your robots.txt Disallow rules. Blocking /*? prevents AI crawlers from accessing filtered/search pages, and blocking */leccion/ hides your course content from AI agents.

checks.name: Structured Data
checks.details: 3 JSON-LD block(s) found. Schema types: Organization, WebSite, WebPage. Missing Course schema, pricing, and detailed service descriptions.

params.findings: 3 JSON-LD block(s) found. Schema types: Organization, WebSite, WebPage. Missing Course schema, pricing, and detailed service descriptions

checks.recommendation: Add Course schema (schema.org/Course) for each course with name, description, price, provider, and duration. Add Product schema for course packs with pricing.

checks.name: Meta Tags & Open Graph
checks.details: Title tag present. OG image present. Meta description incomplete — does not clearly describe services or courses offered.

params.findings: Title tag present. OG image present. Meta description incomplete

checks.name: Sitemap
checks.details: Sitemap index found with 4 sitemap(s): posts, pages, products, categories.

checks.name: Response Time
checks.details: Acceptable response time but page is heavy — WordPress + Divi + WooCommerce + multiple plugins add significant load.

steps.details: The AI agent COULD NOT fully complete the task "Quiero aprender a crear una tienda online con WordPress. Encuentra Escuela Emprende, revisa sus cursos de WooCommerce, y matriculame.". The business is discoverable and content-rich, but an AI agent cannot enroll in a course: forms are JS-only with no semantic markup, pricing is hidden, and structured data lacks course/product information. Failures: agent_ready_forms, structured_data.
